title: Legionella Risk Assessment Report

tokens.{{RISK_RATING}}: computed: HIGH if any dead leg > 0.45m, MEDIUM if TMV failures, LOW otherwise

sections.title: 1. Executive Summary
sections.content: This Legionella Risk Assessment has been prepared for {{PROJECT_NAME}} in accordance with the requirements of ACOP L8 (4th Edition) and HSG 274 Part 2. The assessment date is {{ASSESSMENT_DATE}}. Overall risk rating: {{RISK_RATING}}.

sections.title: 2. Building and System Description
sections.content: Building type: {{BUILDING_TYPE}}. The domestic water installation comprises hot water storage at a minimum of {{STORAGE_HOT_TEMP}}°C, distributed at {{DISTRIBUTION_HOT_TEMP}}°C minimum, with cold water maintained below {{COLD_MAX_TEMP}}°C at all outlets.

sections.title: 3. Dead-Leg Register
sections.content: {{DEAD_LEG_COUNT}} dead-leg(s) identified exceeding the HSG 274 limit of 0.45m. See table: {{DEAD_LEG_TABLE}}

sections.title: 4. TMV Register
sections.content: {{TMV_COUNT}} thermostatic mixing valve(s) identified. {{TMV_FAIL_COUNT}} fail temperature validation. See register: {{TMV_TABLE}}

sections.title: 5. Control Measures
sections.content:
The following control measures are required per ACOP L8 §155-168:
• Hot water storage ≥ 60°C
• Hot distribution ≥ 50°C at all sentinel outlets
• Cold water ≤ 20°C at all outlets
• Weekly flush of infrequently used outlets
• Annual descaling of showerheads and hoses
• Regular inspection of calorifiers and tanks
• Annual TMV inspection and test per BS 8680

sections.title: 6. Risk Summary and Next Review
sections.content: Overall risk rating: {{RISK_RATING}}. This assessment is valid for 12 months. Next review due: {{NEXT_REVIEW_DATE}}. Assessor: {{ASSESSOR_NAME}}.

note: This template is rendered by PlumbLegionellaReportCommand using a text-based renderer when the .docx template file is not present. To enable Word rendering, place a legionella_risk_assessment.docx template file in the _template_sources directory.
